name: Pizza Day
author: Poki
description: Pizza Day is a fun cooking simulator game where you run your very own pizza kitchen! Take customer orders, knead the dough, spread the sauce, add delicious toppings, and bake your pizza to perfection, but don’t let it burn! Slice it up and serve hungry customers to earn coins. Unlock new ingredients and even a special burger mode for extra fun. Ready to cook, bake, and serve the tastiest pizzas in town? How to play Pizza Day? Click or tap to play! Who created Pizza Day? Pizza Day is created by Playrea. Play their other games on Poki: Brainrot Merge , Brainrot Puzzle , Pocket Zoo and Guess the Emojis ! How can I play Pizza Day for free? You can play Pizza Day for free on Poki. Can I play Pizza Day on mobile devices and desktop? Pizza Day can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
